sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_multiIf (id Int32, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_multiIf SET value = multiIf(value < 15, value + 5, value >= 15, value - 5) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, multiIf(value < 15, 'Low', value >= 15 AND value < 25, 'Medium', 'High') AS category FROM test_multiIf;
SELECT multiIf(id = 1, value * 2, id = 2, value * 3, 'None') AS calculated_value FROM test_multiIf;
